title: festuca rigescens
intro: Festuca rigescens, commonly known as bent, is a type of grass that belongs to the family Poaceae. Traditionally, the plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Festuca rigescens include its ability to soothe digestive issues and reduce inflammation, making it a popular herbal remedy for various ailments. Festuca rigescens can be prepared as a tea or infusion, and it is also used in traditional herbal medicine as a tincture or poultice.
